PSG Dominate Fontenay With Commanding French Cup Victory

Dec 21, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

PSG Cruise Comfortably Past Fontenay in French Cup

Paris Saint-Germain delivered a professional 4–0 French Cup win over Fontenay, combining discipline, rotation, and efficiency to avoid any upset threat.
